security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
